causal_question: Did counties identified as marginal-faction in 1978 experience larger growth in the non-state (collective + private) share of industrial output from 1965 to 1978 than other counties?
vague_question: Did counties labeled as "marginal" in 1978 see bigger increases in the share of industry run by non-state firms between the mid-1960s and 1978 compared with other counties?
